name: Farm and Mine
author: Poki
description: Farm and Mine is a simulation game that allows you to build and manage your very own farming and mining empire. Begin with a single plot of land and grow crops to feed your villagers, gradually expanding your population and unlocking all kinds of opportunities. The increasing population can bring you new workforces to help you with various tasks like planting, cow husbandry, pumping, house construction, fishing, and more! With unlimited possibilities and the richest resources at your disposal, how big can you grow your thriving town? How to play Farm and Mine? The game has an embedded auto-clicker. Simply click on different objects to activate the auto-clicker. Who created Farm and Mine? Farm and Mine is created by Airapport. Play their other games on Poki: Babel Tower ! How can I play Farm and Mine for free? You can play Farm and Mine for free on Poki. Can I play Farm and Mine on mobile devices and desktop? Farm and Mine can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
